        "date": "2025-04-11T09:21:00+07:00",
        "body": "Good afternoon,\nSchedule pick up\nPick up Date  4/11/25\nCompany name  Axium Plastics\nWarehouse address  2010 Spillman DriveBethlehem PA 43054\nWarehouse hours  8am – 3pm\nPoint of contact name  Reema\nPoint of contact phone#  484-705-5499\nPick up# (OR RPI PO#)   REFERENCE/PU#? 80310524 RPI P.O. # MR2503-0156\nTotal pallets  8\nGross weight with pallet(s) LBS 1,700\nPallet Dimensions  48 x 40 x 96\nClass #  NFMC Code: I can fill this in\nCommodity name   BG-200-PET-PP (Plastic Bottles)\nAdditional NOTE  SHIP TO ROBINSON PHARMA, INC.  1683 SUNFLOWER AVE  COSTA MESA, CA 92626\n\nHave a great day,\nJeanette Terraciano",
        "is_new_email": false
      },

        "subject": "Re: MR2503-0156",
        "date": "2025-04-11T10:50:00+07:00",
        "body": "Hi Jeanette,\nPlease see the attached BOL for 4/11 pickup\nIMPORTANT: OUR RECEIVING TEAM WILL REJECT ALL SHIPMENTS WITHOUT PROPER DOCUMENTATION\nPlease send the digital PDF packing slip & CoC to RP.ReceivingTeam@rpi.inc,  prior to ship date to make sure our receiving team has the necessary documents\nPlease forward all invoices to accountpayable@rpi.inc\nWarm Regards,\nAden Lam",

parameters.content:
# Main Handle Incoming Email Flow
1. Assemble mail, previous mail in thread, PO data
2. Start handle Logic

## LLM provider: For extract and infer
- Low top-p
- Low top-k

## Follow-up Action Flow (undone)
1. Build a service (scheduler or consumer)
2. Push a job to **consumer** or set a flag to **scheduler**
**Notes**: Using template mail & prompt to generate content

## TODO: Should check if email is reply for an email
- if yes: SentRequestEtaEmailJobs is schedule job to wait for (a time) then send emails to request vendor for ETA. If mail haven't sent yet but vendor reply with new mail -> Cancel the job

## Context aware
**Todo: Add a Node
**To check if mail conversation talk about ETA
